messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?

Yes, I can do this task. 
I will now open WhatsApp. 
(Please note that I don't have direct access to your system, but I can provide you with instructions or a command to open WhatsApp if you're using a computer or mobile device) 
If you're on a computer, you can simply search for WhatsApp in your start menu (Windows) or spotlight search (Mac) and click on it to open. 
If you're on a mobile device, you can find WhatsApp on your home screen or in your app drawer and tap on it to open. 
Would you like more specific instructions?
